mapper.select: SELECT t1.id AS employeeId, t1.NAME AS employeeName, mobile, area AS country, nation, idType, idCode AS idNumber, sex, email, nativePlace, bornDate AS dateOfBirth, birthType, birthDay, age, address, lastEducation, t2.entryDate , probation, regularDate AS becomeTime, workNo AS jobNumber, t1.depId as deptId, leader AS parentId, postion, duty AS postLevel, workPlace AS workAddress, detailPlace AS workDetailAddress, workCity, inviteType, enageType, STATUS, workPeriodBegin, workPeriod, empStatus, t3.NAME AS deptName FROM tbemployeebase t1 LEFT JOIN tbemployeestation t2 on t1.id = t2.empId LEFT JOIN tbdeplist t3 ON t2.depId = t3.id where t1.empStatus!='9'

SELECT a.employee_id, a.employee_name, a.mobile, a.id_type, a.id_number, a.sex, date_format(a.date_of_birth, '%Y-%m-%d') as date_of_birth, a.birthday, a.email, a.age, a.country, a.nation, a.native_place, a.address, a.highest_education, date_format(a.entry_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as entry_time, a.probation, a.entry_status, date_format(a.become_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as become_time, a.job_number, d.dept_id, d.name as dept_name, c.employee_name as parent_name, a.parent_id, a.post, a.post_level, a.work_address, a.work_detail_address, a.work_city, a.employment_forms, a.status, date_format(a.company_age_start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as company_age_start_time, a.company_age, e.salary_card_num, e.account_opening_city, e.bank_name, e.opening_bank, g.accumulation_fund_num, g.social_security_num, g.scheme_id, h.value as channelName, f.contract_type, f.contract_num, f.start_time, f.end_time, f.term FROM `hrm_employee` `a` left join `hrm_employee` c on a.parent_id = c.employee_id left join `hrm_dept` d on a.dept_id = d.dept_id left join `hrm_employee_salary_card` e on a.employee_id = e.employee_id left join `hrm_employee_social_security_info` g on a.employee_id = g.employee_id left join hrm_recruit_channel h on a.channel_id = h.channel_id left join `hrm_employee_contract` f on a.employee_id = f.employee_id and f.status = 1 where a.is_del = 0 and 1=1
and a.employee_id in
#{employeeId}
and 1=2
group by a.employee_id
ORDER BY a.${data.sortField}
desc
asc
ORDER BY a.`update_time` desc

if.test: data.status != null and data.status != '' and data.status != 11 and data.status != 12 and data.status != 13 and data.status != 14 and data.status != 15

sql.if: and a.status in (1,2) and a.entry_status in (1,3)

choose.when: and a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record where year(change_time) = year(now()) and month(change_time) = month(now()) and type = 1 group by employee_id having max(create_time))

and a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record where year(change_time) = year(now()) and month(change_time) = month(now()) and type = 2 group by employee_id having max(create_time))

and a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record where year(change_time) = year(now()) and month(change_time) = month(now()) and type = 3 group by employee_id having max(create_time))

and a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee_abnormal_change_record where year(change_time) = year(now()) and month(change_time) = month(now()) and type = 4 group by employee_id having max(create_time))
and a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee where year(entry_time) = year(now()) and month(entry_time) = month(now()) and entry_status = 2)

and a.employee_id in (select a.employee_id from hrm_employee a left join hrm_employee_quit_info b on a.employee_id = b.employee_id where year(b.plan_quit_time) = year(now()) and month(b.plan_quit_time) = month(now()) and a.entry_status = 3)

and a.employee_id in (select a.employee_id from hrm_employee a left join hrm_employee_quit_info b on a.employee_id = b.employee_id where year(b.plan_quit_time) = year(now()) and month(b.plan_quit_time) = month(now()) and a.entry_status = 3)
and a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee_contract where year(end_time) = year(now()) and month(end_time) = month(now()) group by employee_id)
and a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee where status = 2 and year(become_time) = year(now()) and month(become_time) = month(now()) group by employee_id)
and a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee where year(entry_time) = year(now()) and month(entry_time) = month(now()) and entry_status = 2)

mapper.select: select * FROM hrm_employee WHERE entry_status='1' and is_del='0' and dept_id in (select dept_id FROM hrm_dept WHERE name in ('质量部','仓库','质检部','设备技术部','生产部','仓储部','研发部','工程部')) and (post not in ('仓库副经理','质检经理','生产部经理','副经理') or post like '%经理%')
